system_desc: Run system diagnostics. Output appears in the panel below.
network_desc: View network status and manage configuration.
ctrl_net_diag_desc: View detailed interface and port information.
ctrl_ipconfig_desc: Assign a static IP or revert to DHCP. Changes are written to /etc/dhcpcd.conf and take effect after a reboot.
ctrl_hostname_desc: Rename this device on the network. Only letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed.
ctrl_smb_desc: Control the Samba file sharing service (smbd).
tunnels_desc: Manage remote access tunnels. Enabling a tunnel exposes this device beyond the local network.
ctrl_tailscale_desc: Join or leave the Tailscale network. Allows secure remote access via a private VPN mesh.
ctrl_ngrok_desc: Expose local ports to the internet via ngrok tunnelling. Auth token must be configured on the device first.
